name: Metairie Motors
description_short: Used car dealership in Metairie, Louisiana offering pre-owned vehicles with flexible financing options including Buy Here Pay Here and bad credit programs.
description_long:
Metairie Motors LLC is an independent used car dealership located at 3004 Lime St, Metairie, Louisiana 70006. The dealership has built a reputation as a well-known local operator in the Metairie market, focusing on serving customers with varying credit profiles and financial situations. The company positions itself as a community-focused dealer that recognizes the challenges customers face when purchasing vehicles, particularly those with financing difficulties.

The dealership offers a broad inventory of pre-owned vehicles ranging from economy models ($5,500-$6,900) to higher-end options (up to $29,599), spanning multiple manufacturers including Toyota, Honda, Chevrolet, Ford, RAM, GMC, and luxury brands like Land Rover and Mercedes-Benz. Vehicle inventory includes sedans, SUVs, pickups, passenger vans, and cargo vehicles with model years from 2005 to 2022. All vehicles undergo mechanical inspection by in-house skilled mechanics before placement on the lot. The dealership provides an online car finder tool with searchable filters by make, model, body type, year, price range, and mileage.

Metairie Motors distinguishes itself through relationship-based financing partnerships with multiple lenders, enabling approval for customers with good credit, bad credit, or first-time buyers. The dealership explicitly advertises Buy Here Pay Here financing and bad credit/no credit financing options as core offerings. The company emphasizes accessibility, stating that everyone should have access to a reliable vehicle regardless of financial situation. Marketing materials highlight customer testimonials praising service quality and flexibility.

The dealership operates as a traditional used car dealer with standard retail markup rather than a consumer finance company. While they offer financing solutions through lender partnerships, they do not directly function as a lender. The inventory and pricing are typical for independent used dealers in the region, with some vehicles showing higher mileage (155,000-175,000 miles) at lower price points. There is limited transparency on specific APR rates, terms, or lender partners on their public website.
pros: Offers Buy Here Pay Here financing specifically designed for subprime borrowers
Multiple lender partnerships increase approval odds for customers with bad credit or no credit history
Wide vehicle selection spanning 17+ manufacturers with price range from $5,500-$29,599
All inventory vehicles mechanically inspected by in-house mechanics before sale
Online car finder tool with granular search filters (make, model, body type, price, mileage, year)
Local Metairie, Louisiana location with established reputation as independent dealership
Available financing for first-time buyers with stated flexibility across credit score ranges
cons: No specific APR rates, loan terms, or lender details disclosed on website
Many vehicles in inventory have high mileage (135,000-175,000+ miles)
Limited information about warranty or post-purchase vehicle support
Buy Here Pay Here programs typically involve in-house payment collection and GPS tracking, not explained on site
No transparent pricing breakdown or down payment requirements listed
best_for: Buyers with bad credit or no credit history seeking vehicle financing
First-time car buyers needing flexible financing options
Local Metairie residents seeking independent dealer relationships
Consumers needing affordable used vehicles under $10,000
diagnosis: Metairie Motors is a traditional used car dealership, not a consumer finance company, though it partners with lenders to offer subprime auto financing including Buy Here Pay Here programs. Best suited for credit-challenged buyers in the Metairie area seeking affordable used vehicles with flexible financing, but transparency on rates and terms is minimal and many vehicles carry substantial mileage.
services: Used vehicle sales and inventory management
Buy Here Pay Here financing programs
Multi-lender financing partnerships and credit approval
Online car finder and search tool
In-house vehicle maintenance by skilled mechanics
Trade-in and private sale vehicle acquisition
